metadata.description: Skillsets distilled from great books, turned into installable Claude plugins.

plugins.name: build-sprint
plugins.description: Run a 5-day design sprint that ends in working software, adapted from Jake Knapp's Sprint. One skill per day: set the stage, map, sketch, decide, build, test.

plugins.name: shape-up
plugins.description: Shape, bet, and ship work in six-week cycles, adapted from Ryan Singer's Shape Up. Skills for shaping a pitch, running the betting table, building with scopes and hill charts, and cool-down.
